descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: characteristic length scale of crystalline grains
descriptors.rationale: controls mechanical properties via Hall-Petch relationship

quality.notes: mean obscures distribution shape and variance

descriptors.name: grain boundary misorientation
descriptors.physical_meaning: angular difference between adjacent crystal orientations
descriptors.rationale: determines grain boundary energy and mobility

quality.notes: bin width choice affects information retention

descriptors.name: texture intensity
descriptors.physical_meaning: degree of preferred crystallographic orientation alignment
descriptors.rationale: affects anisotropic mechanical and physical properties

representation.encoding: texture index J or ODF maximum
representation.notes: scalar summary of orientation distribution function

quality.loss_reason: full ODF compressed to single metric
quality.notes: different ODFs can yield identical scalar

descriptors.name: grain aspect ratio
descriptors.rationale: indicates deformation history and directional properties

representation.notes: ratio always greater than or equal one

descriptors.name: grain boundary density
descriptors.rationale: quantifies grain boundary area affecting diffusion

quality.notes: same density allows different network topologies

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: total dislocation line length per volume
descriptors.rationale: controls strain hardening and stored energy

representation.notes: derived from dislocation density and moduli

quality.notes: multiple defect configurations yield same energy

descriptors.name: recrystallization fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: volume fraction transformed to new grains

quality.truncation_error: medium - temporal and spatial detail absent

descriptors.name: grain boundary character distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: population of boundary types by structure
descriptors.rationale: special boundaries affect material transport properties

representation.notes: categorical bins for CSL boundaries Sigma3-Sigma29

quality.notes: boundary plane orientation typically not included
